data.body:
G4 container child-consistency audit (parent f89d-e54d-203d-4ee0 √ó THIS child 822a "Honest bidirectional round-trip probe; de-encode 'expected-bug' guards"), all 7 cross-child interaction modes checked against the WHOLE sibling roster (2359/33d0/59ef/8937/fe57) under the high-confidence / benign-reading filter, corroborated against the repo. VERDICT: clean pairing ‚Äî no G4 cross-child finding.

Repo corroboration: the probe guard 822a de-encodes is live (search confirms scripts/jira-pressure-test/e2e_field_validation_probe.sh L1547 `matrix_set "comments" "inbound" "update" "NOT-SYNCED"`; L1914 "inbound NOT implemented ‚Äî known gap, shown as NOT-SYNCED"), and a search for `issuelinks` under scripts/jira-pressure-test returns NO matches ‚Äî corroborating 822a's premise that "no probe round-trips relationships at all." No sibling edits the probe scripts, so 822a's audit target is live.

7-mode walk for THIS pairing:
- Implicit shared state ‚Äî BENIGN. 822a file_impact = e2e_field_validation_probe.sh (de-encode guards) + tests/integration/rebar_reconciler/test_roundtrip.py (new). DISJOINT from every sibling: the outbound-applier cluster (33d0‚Üíapply_outbound.py/batch_dispatch.py/applier.py; 2359‚Üíbatch_dispatch.py/applier.py/reconcile.py) and the schema/fixture/contract files (8937‚Üí_snapshot_schema.py/test_snapshot_contract.py/fetcher.py; fe57‚Üí_fakes.py/fixtures/capture script; 59ef‚Üítest_acliclient_contract.py/acli_graph.py) are all disjoint. No shared-file co-edit.
- Conflicting assumptions ‚Äî BENIGN. 822a asserts inbound‚Üîoutbound round-trip OUTCOMES (did comment/link/parent sync) through "the production path"; it does NOT round-trip labels and does NOT read the `labels_applied` sub-op payload, so the outbound labels list-vs-count representation conflict tracked on 2359/33d0 is outbound-telemetry-internal and untouched by 822a. Consistent with fe57 (unmassaged fixtures through fetch_snapshot), 8937 (snapshot-entry schema), and 33d0 (production batch applier).
- Dependency gap ‚Äî BENIGN. 822a's only input dependency ‚Äî story A's fixtures/fake ‚Äî is correctly declared via depends_on fe57. The producer‚Üîconsumer schema/contract (8937) is explicitly scoped OUT and not required to stand up a behavioral round-trip. The inbound `comment`/`issuelinks` reads and outbound batch link/comment/parent dispatch its round-trip exercises already exist in production (bug-0ee6/3f04 fixes landed), so 822a has no unmet "fix-must-land-first" edge to a sibling. Critically, 822a binds to "the production path" ABSTRACTLY and so does not require a hard 33d0-before-822a edge: against current code the production batch path already carries the dispatch its round-trip asserts, and after 33d0's collapse the survivor IS the production path by construction. This is the SAME abstract-binding pattern ruled benign for keystone 8937 (which likewise drives "the production path" round-trip without a depends_on 33d0) ‚Äî applied symmetrically here.
- Scope overlap ‚Äî BENIGN (benign-reading filter). 33d0 AC2 (OUTBOUND-only combined multi-sub-op UPDATE asserting each sub-op took effect = consolidation correctness), 8937 AC3 (assembled snapshot-entry CONTRACT through fetcher‚Üídiffer‚Üíapplier), and 822a AC1 (BIDIRECTIONAL inbound‚Üîoutbound comment/link/parent ROUND-TRIP, test_roundtrip.py) exercise the same production path from distinct angles on distinct files ‚Äî complementary, not duplicative. 822a explicitly scopes the schema/contract OUT (‚Üí8937).
- Ordering violation ‚Äî BENIGN. 822a's edited files are disjoint from the 33d0‚Üî2359 same-region outbound-applier sequencing cluster, so it is not entangled in that hazard. The only hard ordering edge (fixtures before the test that uses them) is captured by depends_on fe57; no hard "33d0-before-822a" sequence is required for 822a's assertions to be meaningful (abstract production-path binding, behavior already in code).
- Consumer impact ‚Äî BENIGN. 822a AC3 keeps the hermetic round-trip in CI and any live variant opt-in/scheduled/documented (consistent with the epic's "live e2e is overkill / never flakes CI" posture and parent "no net increase in brittle tests"); AC4 asserts round-trip OUTCOMES, not whole-blob equality, imposing no brittle expectation on consumers.
- Residual references ‚Äî BENIGN. The `Phase3.verify-inbound-comments-gap ‚Ä¶ NOT-SYNCED` guard 822a converts exists verbatim in the repo; no sibling deletes the probe scripts under scripts/jira-pressure-test, so its audit target is live. 33d0's deletion of the dead typed-leaf applier strands nothing 822a references ‚Äî 822a drives the production batch path, not the typed leaf.

The roster-level parent anti-change-detector-guardrail matter is a G3 coverage question (and per the parent AC's explicit "(owned by story B)" clause is owned by 8937) ‚Äî not a G4 cross-child inconsistency, so not addressed here.

VERDICT for this pairing (parent √ó 822a): no G4 cross-child finding; all 7 interaction modes read benign under the high-confidence / benign-reading filter.
